mutation.note: Stryker on the changed rate-caps.ts (per-key cap window): 102 killed / 49 survived / 13 no-cov = 67.5% covered. Survivors dominated by env-var-name string literals (num("EKOA_RATECAP_*",default) -> num("",default) survives because the default is used when the env is unset) and log-message text - non-behavioral; the per-key comparison LOGIC mutants were killed. Whole-repo mutation over gateway.ts was impractical (648 mutants x the heavy serial vitest project ~12min/full-run); its behaviour is proven by the once-per-run deliberate-red + the exhaustive per-slice dual reviews, each real finding shipped with a committed regression pin.
